name: command-availability-cleanup
title: Command availability cleanup 收束
description: 实现 design backlog Slice 5 / D5：删除或收窄 runtime_command_state 平行控制状态，使 ConversationCommandAvailabilityResolver 成为唯一 command availability owner；前端命令 handler 只依赖 backend command.enabled/stale_guard 作为语义准入，workspaceStatus 仅保留为展示/加载 UX。
creator: codex-agent
